summary: The diff implements branding updates (REQ-1), text readability improvements (REQ-2), and backend functionality fixes (REQ-3 partial). However, REQ-4 (downloadable project package) is not implemented in the diff. The project_state.json appears to be a planning/tracking file but does not constitute a downloadable archive. Several backend fixes are present but comprehensive audit evidence for all features (authentication flow, profile setup, admin access, etc.) is not fully visible due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Provide the complete project as a downloadable package that includes all source files, configuration, and assets in a single organized folder structure
missing_requirements.reason: No implementation of downloadable archive functionality found. The project_state.json file is a tracking document, not a downloadable package feature. No zip/archive generation, download endpoint, or packaging script is evident in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Comprehensive audit and fixing of all application functionality (partial evidence only)
missing_requirements.reason: While backend/main.mo shows some fixes and the diff includes various functional components, the truncated nature of several files means full evidence of testing/fixing all features (image generation, gallery display, download, delete, authentication flow, profile setup, admin panel) cannot be confirmed. Backend file is heavily truncated.

hallucinated_features.description: Undo/Redo functionality in image generation with history state management
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention undo/redo features. This appears to be an enhancement beyond fixing existing functionality. REQ-3 specifies auditing and fixing non-working features, not adding new interaction patterns.
